backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining user profile, service category, appliance service, and contact inquiry types with CRUD operations, authorization via access control mixins, and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two ServicesPage features—replacing the service catalog with bilingual entries and auditing/cleaning garbled text—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each component's purpose, used as a build-planning reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'ServiceExpert Bengali Home Appliance Repair Service' and mounting the root div with the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing client-side page routing, authentication state via Internet Identity, profile setup modal display, and theme provider wrapping.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying Bengali about text referencing পশ্চিমবঙ্গ, quick navigation links, and contact details including phone, two emails, and Tarakeswar address.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky responsive header with emerald gradient, logo, Bengali navigation links, and authenticated/unauthenticated controls including dashboard and logout buttons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog component that collects and saves a new user's name, mobile, and email to set up their profile using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/saving user profiles, listing service categories and appliance services, submitting contact inquiries, and uploading profile photos.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar variables).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: A contact page with a form to submit name, email, and message inquiries via `useSubmitContactInquiry`, alongside static contact information cards.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: A user dashboard page that displays and allows editing of the caller's profile (name, mobile, email) and supports profile photo upload with preview using `useSaveCallerUserProfile`.
frontend/src/pages/ForgotPasswordPage.ts: Displays a password recovery page in Bengali explaining how to recover an account using Internet Identity, with steps listed and navigation buttons to login and register pages.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the marketing home page with a hero section, feature cards (skilled technicians, fast service, etc.), and navigation buttons to services and contact pages.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity using the useInternetIdentity hook, showing loading state and error alerts with links to register and forgot-password pages.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page that creates a new account via Internet Identity login, mirroring the login flow with a brief explanation of what Internet Identity is.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays a bilingual (English/Bengali) grid of 10 home appliance service categories (fridge, AC, washing machine, etc.) each with sub-services like installation, repair, and cleaning.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 9) describing the ServiceExpert app's architecture, tech stack (React + Motoko on ICP), existing features, known issues, and design decisions for both frontend and backend.
